changes: ✨ **Login screen** — password-protected entry page with dark-themed UI matching the app style.
✨ **Hardened session secret** — AUTH_SECRET is a random 64-char hex token, httpOnly cookie, secure in production.
✨ **Cost tracking to Supabase** — debate costs now persisted to `debate_costs` table instead of a local file, works on Vercel.
🐛 **Agent files on Vercel** — added `outputFileTracingIncludes` so `agents/` and `profile/` are bundled into the serverless function (fixes ENOENT crash).
✨ **Supabase data pipeline** — market data sourced from stock-predictor Supabase DB instead of Yahoo Finance.
✨ **Slow data panel** — earnings, analyst targets, put/call ratio, short interest, insider activity, Google Trends, alpha vs SPY/sector, support/resistance.
✨ **Debate UI redesign** — chat-style layout, cost panel, markdown rendering, smart scroll, token tracking, stop/resume buttons.
⚡ **Market data format** — formatSnapshot() reduces token cost ~75% (630 → 150 tokens per ticker).
